# Psychology Direct
> Expert Witness & Educational Psychologists

Psychology Direct connects solicitors, schools, and local authorities with HCPC-registered psychologists and psychiatrists for expert witness reports and educational psychology assessments across the UK.

## Services
- Expert Witness Reports: Family, Criminal, Civil/PI, Employment, Prison Law, Immigration, Clinical Negligence
- Educational Psychology: EHCP Assessments, School Consultancy, Exam Access Arrangements, Training
- Managed Service: 24-hour CV matching, quality assurance, dedicated client management

## Key Facts
- Founded: 2009
- Network: 1,000+ vetted experts nationwide
- Accreditations: BPS, HCPC, GMC registered experts
- Award: SME Surrey Business Awards 2024 Gold Winner
- Phone: 01306 879 975
- Email: enquiries@psychologydirect.co.uk
- Address: PO Box 497, Leatherhead, Surrey, KT22 2PD
- Website: https://www.psychologydirect.co.uk
